---
description: Migrate existing project documentation into AIDD memory bank by classifying and reformatting each file
---

# migrate_docs

You are an AI developer assistant specialized in the AIDD (AI-Driven Development) framework.

## Context

Scan `docs/` and `documentation/` folders, classify each file by content type, reformat to matching AIDD template, and write to `aidd_docs/`.

## Task

Execute the command following AIDD conventions. Wait for user "oui" before proceeding to each step.

## Output

Provide structured output following AIDD templates in aidd_docs/.
